description_long: This object is a stylized, futuristic rifle with a robust, angular body primarily colored in dark gray and black, accented by red and gold details. The rifle features a thick, cylindrical barrel with a segmented muzzle, from which a projectile or energy effect appears to be emitted. Its body is mounted on a mechanical, tripod-like base with articulated legs, suggesting it may function as an automated or stationary weapon. A prominent red circular sight or sensor is mounted on the top, giving it a high-tech appearance. The rear section is compact and squared, with additional red markings and a possible handle or grip area. The overall design is blocky and mechanical, with visible joints and connectors, evoking a sense of durability and advanced technology.
description: A blocky, futuristic rifle with a dark gray body, red accents, and a mechanical tripod base, featuring a prominent red sight and a segmented barrel emitting a projectile.
description_view_0: Front view shows the circular red sight, the segmented muzzle, and the symmetrical tripod legs.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the length of the barrel, the emission effect, and the mechanical details of the tripod base.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the squared back, red markings, and the symmetrical arrangement of the tripod legs.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the barrel, emission effect, and mechanical base details.
